required_slots.proves: Every strengthened source claim has a verified source role and claim ceiling.
Claims are connected to source warrants rather than decorative bibliography.
No quotation or paraphrase is promoted without direct verification.
A reviewer or expert has examined the source use and recorded judgment.

promotion_rule: Promotion requires all required files to exist and survive clearly labeled review or technical audit. A complete vault is necessary but not alone sufficient for expert-facing claims.
